name: Sakura Reveries
descriptionTemplate: After the exploration starts, shuffle 1 {Vernal Message} into the deck: Arithmetica Cost 1, gain [StateArg1] Keyflare, permanently transforms into {Sakura Blossoms} after played: Arithmetica Cost 1, gain [StateArg2] Keyflare, after playing it permanently transforms into {Hanafubuki}: Arithmetica Cost 1, gain [StateArg3] Keyflare, permanently transforms into {Ichigo Ichie} after played: Arithmetica Cost 1, choose 1 from 3 random unlocked Posse to immediately unleash and trigger 2 times, permanently transforms into {Vernal Message} after played. All of these Cards have {Retain}.
lore:
As a top student at Mythag, Ramona operates on pure logic and reason. She is calm, witty, and incredibly reliable.
Yet occasionally, even she falls into quiet reverie when faced with the world’s absolute terror—or its absolute splendor.
Gazing at the endless sea of pink, Ramona fell silent.
She knew these cherry blossoms would fade within three weeks, their lush branches soon turning bare and desolate.
A human life lasts far longer than three weeks or thirty years, yet like these trees, it comes only once.
The greatest human illusion is the belief that one will live forever.
Ramona understands this.
Like the blooming and wilting of flowers, human life and death are ultimately just phenomena of nature.
Ramona understands this, too.
But humans always seek to give their existence meaning; that is why every new student enters the gates of Mythag.
They are the pioneers against Dissolution, the final line of defense for humanity’s future.
Their lives aren't just natural phenomena; even destined to perish, they are actively shaping the course of this world.
They fight side by side, weathering every storm together.
Like two blossoms on the same branch, they bud together, sway in the wind together, and wither together.
Now, it is time to go back.
The one who relies on her—and whom she can rely on in return—is still waiting.
